title: ClusterMetrics.java
description:
This class provides information about the current state of the Map-Reduce cluster.

--- FILE: QueueAclsInfo.java ---
TITLE: QueueAclsInfo.java

DESCRIPTION: This class encapsulates Queue ACLs for a particular user.

--- FILE: TaskTrackerInfo.java ---
TITLE: TaskTrackerInfo.java

DESCRIPTION: This class contains information about a TaskTracker, including its name, blacklisting status, reason for blacklisting, and blacklist report.

--- DIRECTORY: protocol ---
TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Protocol

DESCRIPTION: The protocol directory contains classes that define the communication protocol between the client and the Hadoop MapReduce framework.

--- DIRECTORY: security ---
TITLE: MapReduce Delegation Token Architecture

DESCRIPTION: The MapReduce delegation token architecture is responsible for managing and generating delegation tokens specific to MapReduce.

--- DIRECTORY: v2 ---
TITLE: LogParams.java

DESCRIPTION: This class is used to store the parameters required for fetching logs.
